features: Gentle on Sensitive Skin: Specially formulated to reduce irritation, nicks, and cuts for a comfortable shave. Rich, Protective Lather: Softens facial hair for a smoother, effortless shave every time. Convenient 3-Pack: Three 200ml cans ensure you never run out of shaving foam. Trusted Brand: Gillette quality for reliable performance and skin comfort. Daily Use Friendly: Ideal for unisex grooming routines at home or on the go.
description: Product description Experience a smooth, irritation-free shave with Gillette Classic Sensitive Skin Shaving Foam. Specially designed for sensitive skin, this foam creates a rich, protective lather that softens hair for a comfortable shave. Perfect for unisex use, it helps reduce nicks, cuts, and irritation, leaving skin feeling refreshed and smooth. This pack of 3 x 200ml cans ensures you always have shaving foam ready at home or on the go. Trusted by millions, Gillette delivers consistent quality for a gentle and effective shaving experience, no matter who uses it. Key Benefits: Gentle and soothing for sensitive skin Protective, rich lather for smooth shaving Reduces nicks, cuts, and irritation Convenient 3-pack for long-lasting use Suitable for unisex grooming routines Directions Dispense a small amount of foam into your hand, work into a lather, apply to skin, shave, and then rinse off.
